task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create an Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Registration endpoint
when user calls POST /api/register sending user_data:
  validate user_data:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
    role is text, required
  saved = save user_data to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user calls POST /api/login sending credentials:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  users = get all Users where email is credentials's email
  guard length of users is greater than 0 or 'Invalid credentials'
  send back { token is 'jwt_token_for_testing' } with status 200

# Get all articles (anyone with auth)
when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  send back all Articles

# Create article (editors and admins only)
when user calls POST /api/articles sending article:
  requires login
  saved = save article to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

# Delete article (admins only)
when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  delete Article with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 204
